data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Consent/privacy-aware eligibility gating', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this gating, yet there is no evidence of its implementation or validation in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in coverage for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of validation for consent/privacy-aware eligibility gating.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
